items.title: [负面] The game has a lot of effort in it and isn't a "ba...
items.summary: The game has a lot of effort in it and isn't a "bad" game, but unless you but an extreme amount of research into the game before playing, then you aren't going to do that well. You're required to have duplicates of characters, and the game is a roguelike, so you can lose by just being unlucky. For most battles each enemy will be doing 25% of your hp per hit, the strategy is to kill them before they kill you, or use a shield, it feels a lot like darkest dungeon.

items.title: [正面] 克苏鲁画风，挺新奇，角色真的喜欢，福利也挺好，剧情也不错。评论区有些小丑真的搞笑，本身不喜欢抽卡类型...
items.summary: 克苏鲁画风，挺新奇，角色真的喜欢，福利也挺好，剧情也不错。评论区有些小丑真的搞笑，本身不喜欢抽卡类型的或者说不喜欢二游的麻烦滚远点，还来给差评，有够出生的。

items.title: [正面] Bom jogo, bem lento, muitas coisas pra fazer, pouc...
items.summary:
Bom jogo, bem lento, muitas coisas pra fazer, pouco tempo.
O sistema automático é burro e não sabe jogar, então te obriga a jogar. 
O sistema de gacha é barato, vc vai ficar sem dinheiro do jogo muito fácil por isso.
As lutas são longas e demoradas, o que faz você as vezes parecer mais burro que o sistema automático do jogo.
10/10

items.title: [正面] the game seems awesome, but I would rather pay for...
items.summary:
the game seems awesome, but I would rather pay for a game and actually play it than play free gacha games, but since the game is free they need to monetize, so there is TONS of different upgrades, currencies, just like any other gacha (I may be wrong, but I just gave up with this games with thousands of menus/currencies/upgrades + /SSR/SR/R different heroes etc)

Thumbs up because I didnt invested to much time to check if I'm wrong about the gacha annoying things
